skills.name: Architecture Decision
skills.description: Create Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for documenting technical choices, alternatives, and trade-offs with team context.
skills.promptPreview: Create Architecture Decision Records documenting technical choices, alternatives considered, trade-offs, and team context.

skills.name: High Availability
skills.description: Design high-availability systems with redundancy, failover, and disaster recovery. Outputs HA architecture, SLA calculations, and failure scenarios.
skills.useCase: Design systems that never go down
skills.promptPreview: Design high-availability systems with redundancy, failover, disaster recovery, SLA calculations, and failure scenario analysis.

skills.name: Scalability Plan
skills.description: Design scalability strategies with horizontal/vertical scaling, caching, sharding, and capacity planning for growing systems.
skills.promptPreview: Design scalability strategies with horizontal/vertical scaling, caching, sharding, and capacity planning for high-growth systems.

skills.name: System Design Doc
skills.description: Create comprehensive system design documents with architecture diagrams, component specs, data flows, and scaling strategies.
skills.promptPreview: Create production-grade system design docs with concrete components, data flows, API contracts, and scaling strategies.
